payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the updated memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it was superseded, so it is no longer considered current.
payload.decision: Recall selected mem_new because it is the more recent, non-superseded memory about Sam from Goldman, and filtered mem_old because it was marked as superseded by newer information.

entity_resolution.reason: Sam from Goldman was treated as the same entity across the recalled memories; no stable internal entity id was provided.

payload.intent: Explain recall behavior for Sam from Goldman, including why the newer memory was returned and the older one was filtered as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it represents the updated, current version of the memory.
mem_old was excluded because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the active memory for Sam from Goldman.
Retain mem_old only as historical context if needed, but do not surface it as current.
If both records are needed, add an explicit supersession link from mem_old to mem_new.
